---
name: Add LLM Provider
about: Request or contribute support for a new LLM provider
title: "Add [PROVIDER] support"
labels: good first issue, provider
---

**Provider:** (e.g., Cohere, Together, Replicate)

**Pricing page URL:** (link to their official pricing)

**API style:** (OpenAI-compatible / Custom)

**Models to add:**
| Model | Input $/MTok | Output $/MTok |
|-------|-------------|--------------|
| | | |

**Notes:** (any quirks about their API — e.g., different usage field names)

_Want to implement this yourself? See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#adding-a-new-provider) — most providers are under 20 lines of code._
